raw_response:
I agree with my colleague on selecting option C (30 days). My additional point would be based on research indicating that after initial rapid growth over around 1-2 weeks, plaque development slows down significantly due to changes in its composition becoming less fluid and more calcified during later stages. This aligns well with Dr. Glickman’s observation emphasizing a peak accumulation period near month mark before stabilizing further.

Answer remains C.
